name: Jess Morales Rocketto, HillaryClinton.com
subject: You're in -- let us know what you think
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
| Friend --

Great news! You've been selected to be one of the first testers of our new call app and the timing couldn't be more perfect.

Tuesday is Election Day in six states AND it very well might be the day that takes Hillary Clinton from front-runner to making history as the first woman ever to clinch the nomination of any major political party. Tuesday is a day we hope to long remember and you can help.

Log in to your account **[here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU2NTg3MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzE4MjI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)** , pick the state you want to call into, and make 12 calls before Election Day on June 7th. You will be calling known Hillary supporters and reminding them to vote on Tuesday. No joke -- you could be the person that makes the call that gets the voter out and locks this thing up for Hillary.

**This could not be more important, and we're thrilled and grateful you've signed up to help out. Log in, use the tool, help Hillary make history, and give us your feedback -- sounds like time well spent this weekend:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU2NTg3MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzE4MjI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Jess

Jessica Morales Rocketto
Digital Organizing Director
Hillary for America

| | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU2NTg3MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzE4MjI2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU2NTg3MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzE4MjI2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU2NTg3MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzE4MjI2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU2NTg3MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzE4MjI2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU2NTg3MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzE4MjI2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU2NTg3MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzE4MjI2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU2NTg3MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzE4MjI2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU2NTg3MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzE4MjI2S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU2NTg3MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzE4MjI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU2NTg3MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwNzE4MjI2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Bullock HQ
subject: this is how we win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

Thanks to so many of you, we nearly doubled what Greg Gianforte raised from contributors in the last fundraising period. But he dumped ANOTHER $50,000 of his fortune into his campaign.

While Steve's opponent is trying to buy the office, we're relying on grassroots donations from Montanans across the state. We have the winning approach but it depends on all of you continuing to be a part of this. **[Help us keep our fundraising on track to compete with Mr. Gianforte and contribute $15 now.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=nh2pETLr5nmOWO2vQZTG0QhzJTH2dksz)**

| [](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=VWzZGNdIDAtjZFvpKF0nDwhzJTH2dksz)
---

Today, Steve is continuing to crisscross the state to open our grassroots field offices. The energy has been off the charts because folks know all that he's done for Montana and what's at stake in this election.

**[Help us keep the enthusiasm going and join the thousands of Montanans supporting this campaign. Chip in $15 now.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=pWKo4W6AYtq9bNiVjHJVdwhzJTH2dksz)
**
Thanks,

Bullock HQ
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ziJeF9eAk3fCFIsob7Q3bQhzJTH2dksz)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=blFBxOzHIw5naGvRMI0hbQhzJTH2dksz).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Let's take advantage of this.
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporter,
The LA Times came out with some very interesting news on Friday: **California's voter rolls swelled by more than 650,000 new voters right before the registration deadline**. This presents us with a golden opportunity - we think a big percentage of those new voters are ready to support Bernie.
**Needless to say, winning California would be a yuuuge boost for our movement.** We've come from more than 50 points down when we started, to a statistical tie in the latest polls. So now, it all depends on turnout.
Our staff and volunteers in California are fired up and working virtually around the clock to get all Bernie's supporters to the polls on Tuesday. **Can you help out on the phones for an hour or two?**
**[Yes, I'll make some calls before election day](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/win-more-states-for-bernie?source=em160605-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/win-more-states-for-bernie?source=em160605-full")**
If you've never made calls for Bernie before, **now is the time to step up.** It's not a complicated process, and we'll give you all the instructions you need to make these important calls. Californians are very receptive to Bernie's progressive message, and if we can pull off a victory there Tuesday, you'll know you played an important role at this pivotal moment of American political history.
We're fighting hard to win California since it's the final and - with 475 pledged delegates up for grabs - biggest state on the primary calendar. A strong showing there will give the superdelegates something very important to think about as they consider who will be the strongest nominee against Trump in the fall.
So we hope you can **[pitch in a couple hours of your time between now and Tuesday](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/win-more-states-for-bernie?source=em160605 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/win-more-states-for-bernie?source=em160605")** to keep our political revolution rolling strong all the way to the convention in Philadelphia.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie
P.S. **[Download our new Bernie Messenger app](https://go.berniesanders.com/messenger "https://go.berniesanders.com/messenger")** to easily text your friends and remind them to vote for Bernie on Tuesday!

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Austin Chambers
subject: You'll want to watch this video
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
The liberal media and the political establishment are at it again.
Today, they pushed forward another round of anonymous attacks against Eric. This time: nameless attacks on camera - faces blacked out and voices changed. Shameless. In other words, a typical political hit job from a biased media and desperate establishment willing to say or do anything to hold power.
Let me be clear: these politically motivated attacks from these anonymous sources are false and flat out cowardly.
Eric's military service and record speaks for itself - he's proud of every single day he served. That's why several months ago when these attacks first started, he released official military records to set the record straight.
The people who served with Eric, and worked with him, know best. That's why so many have stepped forward to speak out about the strong leader they know and trust. And unlike those attacking Eric, they aren't afraid to show their faces or put their names on what they have to say. [Click here to watch a quick message from some of the people who've known Eric for years, including SEALs who actually served with him - you don't want to miss it](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabavGtpF5FC-2F1soVJ1A2DgWtEI-2F4hk0-2FPJ5sL0uU5zIk3K_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23yRktlI4k9ropYW1SpeQ4zIirAP7lGI7DCL6PEIGy6h59yhe3ng50CV-2FOQxOeJs8xW3UaSFo4vzpMSlf2Je3OLhAxE8Uh8xD7cPZ58vAKW8WMOCxn73-2BTgyyGjxOFsI0E7bqhI09qayj5RueikHHzEJ5kEp76QWnE4yb8ZRmg0X-2BsEA1VS2rCVsPd9-2B-2FhD0AB0xguJJiGz9Ntmq3FNubnpVz1Qar-2FK57XE0GNwcaBpmVt-2BLJillwwWdTuLU-2FM1YHEt1zukjLVhsk5f7bdU1cAuQPDCWfp7hfX6hopCmUDF57D6My-2F7d47TNT4x30FdDIcms9LgzRcJbP0nMrpUqbSfzV3cJiXgfmYrJAbQ5JY-2BgkN4mvQjIS-2BwzdQaaIhRQt6LRuJP3CtOs9T5Aqf9TUAnl)
[](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabavGtpF5FC-2F1soVJ1A2DgWtEI-2F4hk0-2FPJ5sL0uU5zIk3K_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23yRktlI4k9ropYW1SpeQ4zIirAP7lGI7DCL6PEIGy6h59yhe3ng50CV-2FOQxOeJs8xW3UaSFo4vzpMSlf2Je3OLhAxE8Uh8xD7cPZ58vAKW8WMOCxn73-2BTgyyGjxOFsI0E7bqhI09qayj5RueikHHzEJ5kEp76QWnE4yb8ZRmg0X-2BsEA1VS2rCVsPd9-2B-2FhD0AB0JZeszu-2BjoJDJgjNs5SMHUE0qoFFrfywOkqp5pNRsn0uIAZQtvfPsvV1oCBbs9qQDeDnyHv2-2FdFmb97aVwj97Sl-2FsyYhiBCd0HwvofFohEEOYXh7RZTD9k5VvsmHBFXDHsU0Pn54XrOsF-2FN-2F-2BlRs-2FpdZsG8TDvgLe94dY-2BTORla0AOZIcFYgUhZkAjbtLj1IMnuAY1fnhIZM-2BBkI1ntESf)
These firsthand accounts from people who served and worked with Eric are powerful - I hope you'll share them with your friends and family. Also, be sure to let everyone know that these anonymous hits are just typical politically motivated attacks, orchestrated by desperate career politicians and special interest groups, with a few dishonest media allies in their pocket.
Make no mistake. These attacks will continue to come, because the political establishment is scared of our campaign. But with your help we'll defeat them. We will win, because Missouri is ready for a conservative patriot willing to take on the establishment to fight for what's right. These anonymous attacks only make us fight harder. We need you to fight along side us - [join our mission today](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabavW21didZYEHPbXe0LggHhB3ar3PoTlsIDL2eTXXYY1S7pyvMqPoChLtL5u7E-2FPYjw-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23yRktlI4k9ropYW1SpeQ4zIirAP7lGI7DCL6PEIGy6h59yhe3ng50CV-2FOQxOeJs8xW3UaSFo4vzpMSlf2Je3OLhAxE8Uh8xD7cPZ58vAKW8WMOCxn73-2BTgyyGjxOFsI0E7bqhI09qayj5RueikHHzEJ5kEp76QWnE4yb8ZRmg0X-2BsEA1VS2rCVsPd9-2B-2FhD0AB0rLLWMCdNhxxyf1eXkg2hIy-2BaTMu-2FhqO3LkGtGaLkmKRTmNBeJENBvTX0gSOMogSzc-2F03QTe6KsKQMihiT-2BnyGq2EeFKSzER6wZurKhvz-2F1cdIuzxR5-2FVqpMYJug4c7RnDR7H9cyISD3w-2BCPSPZve2bZnCkP0FxVAAv9wjXV0T323M2MuvSdm1IESb0-2Fsg3gElONXRQg64xI8X3oOCV9ub) to shake-up Jeff City, and put an end to politics as usual.
On to victory,
AC
Austin Chambers
Campaign Manager
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138 -- St. Louis, Missouri 63108
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. [Unsubscribe](http://links.ericgreitens.com/asm/unsubscribe/?user_id=2167711&data=tgVjKJjOxwFpEWC3ufJoY_cDDZTdcnQ4TakIdMtjfJa28JJvuplrMG4m90G9oe5cS0B2me0BFvBYlWLd6SsHfyP8zcYpAmys-f2Nsd-39YOpJRDHq2aYyoGJCiNn1pwKzyY5u9Z4iqFpLswoTY1js6b6NEImD1um55eEQk6TAr0Hf5NmBpObn88Riz0unXtZR7NoQeoFluVj6IUUxJ_2W6MkstQKy5Br7iUq8EP9EgVONJA5HvqU6tEeugfmQ5fmLro14Jf2oEKwjFvmy4W6v81vk1lG70cwfVfywfsLSxSJCnC1MtlDuOYAnFMsL42yutQvK4TpCkbQZEoG6I9bgbQ6ptuTGbMN91S2zqPpMhyh1b7nGM9VymwBg6JQkSw-4rLsfVIsOmdigu4KbnbsKDiGw0_E2WgLdXwjV-Hh_RFiJlsW9QqlrtjM3uX8wkq8cUmGdlxuoS__JFvC_24esfR5ZE1AKc3rwXVUuQZjN7Cw-r93tkI72H3tcxTKMzEcLM0bitcvQ9a7R4JA3VQTJRYXWpC5MlhedbrOCQoXMLvE6AO5XrakK9czkk8qFGtkwgkDDhA6EZ7ygJsiKUBMz2eDHDdLktm0d3-liAxclFT2pLzW_1VhF7BCbQtT5GTE)
clean_body: Peter, The liberal media and the political establishment are at it again. Today, they pushed forward another round of anonymous attacks against Eric. This time: nameless attacks on camera - faces blacked out and voices changed. Shameless. In other words, a typical political hit job from a biased media and desperate establishment willing to say or do anything to hold power. Let me be clear: these politically motivated attacks from these anonymous sources are false and flat out cowardly. Eric's military service and record speaks for itself - he's proud of every single day he served. That's why several months ago when these attacks first started, he released official military records to set the record straight. The people who served with Eric, and worked with him, know best. That's why so many have stepped forward to speak out about the strong leader they know and trust. And unlike those attacking Eric, they aren't afraid to show their faces or put their names on what they have to say. These firsthand accounts from people who served and worked with Eric are powerful - I hope you'll share them with your friends and family. Also, be sure to let everyone know that these anonymous hits are just typical politically motivated attacks, orchestrated by desperate career politicians and special interest groups, with a few dishonest media allies in their pocket. Make no mistake. These attacks will continue to come, because the political establishment is scared of our campaign. But with your help we'll defeat them. We will win, because Missouri is ready for a conservative patriot willing to take on the establishment to fight for what's right. These anonymous attacks only make us fight harder. We need you to fight along side us - to shake-up Jeff City, and put an end to politics as usual. On to victory, AC Austin Chambers Campaign Manager Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer 4579 Laclede Avenue #138 -- St. Louis, Missouri 63108

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: If you're still with her, now's the time to let her know:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
It was thanks to you | Friend --

Any minute now, Hillary Clinton should become the first woman in the history of our country to win the nomination of any major party. That wasn't fated or inevitable -- it was because of people like you.

The dollars we raised put organizers on the ground in states like North Carolina and Nevada. Your support helped us recruit volunteers in Iowa and Ohio, and put ads on the air in New York and California. It all adds up to more votes earned by any candidate on either side of the aisle and an insurmountable delegate lead.

Before we close this out, we're making sure that Hillary has a chance to see who has been standing with her.

**Will you chip in today -- before Hillary Clinton becomes the Democratic Party nominee -- and join the 1.3 million people who powered this campaign? When we're celebrating, you'll want to know you did everything you could to help her get there (and we’ll also send you a free sticker to say thank you!):** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU2NjEzNTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwODA0NTMwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
With just days until history is made -- you'll want to be a part of it.

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than 1.3 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU2NjEzNTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwODA0NTMwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU2NjEzNTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwODA0NTMwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU2NjEzNTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwODA0NTMwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU2NjEzNTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwODA0NTMwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU2NjEzNTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwODA0NTMwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU2NjEzNTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwODA0NTMwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU2NjEzNTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwODA0NTMwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU2NjEzNTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwODA0NTMwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU2NjEzNTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwODA0NTMwS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU2NjEzNTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwODA0NTMwS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU2NjEzNTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIwODA0NTMwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
